cli.ready: Command line interface ready. Type "help" for available commands.
cli.unknown_command: Unknown command '{command}'. Type 'help' to see available commands.
cli.plugin_no_available_workspace: No plugins available to select in the workspace.
cli.using_arrows: Use UP/DOWN arrows to select a plugin, then press ENTER:

lang.select: Use UP/DOWN arrows to select a language, then press ENTER:

wa_logout.description: Logout a WhatsApp session and remove its credentials

flags.session: Specify the session id to logout

wa_logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to logout and delete session data?
wa_logout.no_session_id: No session id provided and WA_SESSION_NAME is not set.

make_plugin.description: Create a new plugin scaffold in the workspace directory
make_plugin.prompt_name: Enter the name of the new plugin (e.g., my-plugin):
make_plugin.invalid_name: Invalid plugin name. Scopes (e.g., @scope/) are not allowed.
make_plugin.login_required_msg: You must be logged in to create a plugin because the system requires a unique namespace. What would you like to do?

make_command.description: Create a new command in a workspace plugin
make_command.prompt_plugin: Select the plugin to add the command to:
make_command.prompt_name: Enter the name of the command (e.g., ping):

make_event.description: Create a new event in a workspace plugin
make_event.prompt_plugin: Select the plugin to add the event to:
make_event.prompt_name: Enter the filename of the event (e.g., my-event):

make_middleware.description: Create a new middleware in a workspace plugin
make_middleware.prompt_plugin: Select the plugin to add the middleware to:
make_middleware.prompt_name: Enter the filename of the middleware (e.g., my-middleware):
make_middleware.prompt_type: Enter the event type to hook into (e.g., messages.upsert):

make_migration.description: Create a new database migration in a workspace plugin
make_migration.prompt_plugin: Select the plugin to add the migration to:
make_migration.prompt_name: Enter the name of the migration (e.g., users):

plugin_install.description: Install a plugin from the registry

errors.PLUGIN_NOT_FOUND: The requested plugin was not found or is not published.
errors.PLUGIN_VERSION_NOT_FOUND: The specified plugin version was not found.

plugin_uninstall.no_key: Please specify the plugin key to uninstall. e.g., @namespace/name
plugin_uninstall.invalid_key: Invalid plugin key format. Must be @namespace/name or namespace/name
plugin_uninstall.select: Select plugins to uninstall (Space to select, Enter to confirm):
plugin_uninstall.no_installed_plugins: No plugins installed in the plugins directory.
plugin_uninstall.confirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall plugin "{pluginKey}"?
plugin_uninstall.confirm_multiple: Are you sure you want to uninstall {count} plugins: {pluginKeys}?

plugin_publish.description: Publish a plugin to the marketplace
plugin_publish.not_logged_in: You must be logged in to publish a plugin. Run 'login' first.
plugin_publish.no_plugins: No plugins with package.json found in the workspace directory.
plugin_publish.select: Select a plugin from your workspace to publish:
plugin_publish.confirm: Are you sure you want to publish "{pluginName}" version {version}?

errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Validation error. Please check your plugin structure.
errors.INVALID_MANIFEST_JSON: The package.json file has an invalid JSON format.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_PLUGIN_OWNER: You do not own this plugin and cannot publish versions for it.
errors.PLUGIN_VERSION_ALREADY_EXISTS: This plugin version has already been published.
errors.VERSION_MUST_BE_GREATER: The version must be greater than the current latest version.

plugin_upgrade.description: Check and upgrade installed plugins to their latest versions
plugin_upgrade.up_to_date: All plugins are up to date.
plugin_upgrade.instruction: Press Space to select, Enter to confirm.
plugin_upgrade.confirm_warning: Warning: Upgrading will overwrite plugin files. Configs will be merged, but manual changes to core files might be lost. Do you want to proceed?

plugin_middlewares.description: Show loaded middlewares sorted by priority

plugin_migrate.description: Run, rollback, or refresh database migrations for plugins

flags.rollback: Rollback the last migration batch for the plugin
flags.fresh: Rollback all migrations and run them again

plugin_reload.description: Reload all plugins or a specific plugin

flags.plugin: Reload a specific plugin by key

plugin_reload.specify_plugin: Please specify a plugin key to reload, or use --all to reload everything.

services_login.already_logged_in: You are already logged in. Please logout first if you want to switch accounts.

services_logout.already_logged_out: You are already logged out (no token found).
services_logout.revoked: Your token has been revoked from the server and removed locally.

plugin_watcher.usage:
Usage: watcher [flags]

Flags:
  --start          Start the plugin hot-reload watcher
  --stop           Stop the plugin hot-reload watcher
  --status         Check the current status of the watcher
  --help, -h       Show this help message

Examples:
  plugin:watcher --start
  plugin:watcher --status
plugin_watcher.stop_warning: Watcher stopped. It is recommended to restart the bot to optimally clear accumulated memory from development.

wa_status.description: Show bot status and active sessions

restart.confirm: Are you sure you want to restart the bot process?

i18n.lang_change_failed: Failed to change global language to {lang}: {error}

plugin.loaded_count: Loaded {loaded} plugins. Failed to load {failed} plugins.
plugin.dependency_version_mismatch: Disabled: Requires plugin '{dep}' version {required}, but currently installed is version {installed}.
plugin.workspace_login_required: Skipping workspace plugins because you are not logged in. Please login first.

wa.phone_empty: Phone number cannot be empty. Session aborted.
wa.phone_invalid_length: Invalid number length. Must be 8-15 digits.
wa.phone_invalid_format: Do not use leading '0'. Use country code instead (e.g., 62...).
